output_lean:
theorem bounded_analytic_zeros_summable
  {f : ℂ → ℂ}
  (hf_analytic : AnalyticOn ℂ f (Metric.ball 0 1))
  (hf_bounded : ∃ M, ∀ z ∈ Metric.ball 0 1, ‖f z‖ ≤ M)
  (hf_not_zero : ∃ z ∈ Metric.ball 0 1, f z ≠ 0)
  (zeros : ℕ → ℂ)
  (hzeros : ∀ n, f (zeros n) = 0 ∧ ‖zeros n‖ < 1)
  : Summable (fun n => 1 - ‖zeros n‖) := sorry
